headline: First Brands Agrees $25 Million Sale of Key Auto Parts Brands
summary: Bankrupt supplier sells Fram, Autolite, and Trico portfolio to PGI Northstar as liquidation process continues.

headline: Drive A Tesla To Work Here? This Auto Giant Will Ticket Its Own Employees
summary: Stellantis urges employees to drive its brands—Jeep, Ram, Dodge, Chrysler—or face parking tickets and distant lot assignments at HQ.

headline: Ford CEO Jim Farley receives career‑high $27.5M compensation in 2025
summary: The bump in pay comes after a profitable year for Ford, despite challenges like a a devastating fire at an aluminum supplier and tariff impacts.

headline: Ford Issues 2026 Proxy Statement, Sets Virtual Annual Meeting for May 14
summary: DEARBORN, Mich., March 27, 2026--Ford today published its 2026 proxy statement and announced the date of the company’s 2026 annual meeting of shareholders, which will be held virtually.
